name: node-type-check
title: node-type-check
summary: Check the types of JavaScript values at runtime
description:
Check the types of JavaScript values at runtime
This library allows one to run unit test using a Haskell like type
syntax using Node.js.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-type-check because Check the types of JavaScript values at runtime.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-type-check as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-type-check with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-type-check --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
